# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
  labels:
    linkerd.io/control-plane-ns: linkerd
data:
  global: |
    linkerdNamespace: linkerd
    identityTrustDomain: linkrd.cluster
    identityTrustAnchorsPem: |
      -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
      -----END CERTIFICATE-----
    cniEnabled: false
  proxy: |
    proxyImage:
      imageVersion: stable-2.11.1
      imageName: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/proxy
    proxyInitImage:
      imageVersion: stable-2.11.1
      imageName: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/proxy-init
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-microservice
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: linkerd-microservice
        image: cr.l5d.io/linkerd/microservice:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: "security.linkerd.io/v1beta1"
kind: "Server"
metadata:
  name: linkerd-microservice-server
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-microservice
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: "policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1"
kind: "ServerAuthorization"
metadata:
  name: linkerd-microservice-server-auth
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  server:
    name: linkerd-microservice-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
